message:
feat(replay): counterfactual override package format, loader, and applicator (ft-og6q6.4.1)

OverridePackage (.ftoverride) TOML format with pattern/workflow/policy
overrides, wildcard matching, FNV-1a definition hashing, conflict
detection, baseline validation, OverrideManifest, and OverrideApplicator
with substitution recording. 37 unit + 26 property tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
